docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77805267) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEDGHI, ARDALAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOWERY, MYESIA MURPHY, MICHAEL SMITH, WALTER DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-13-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-06-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-20-2026
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 77805267) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEDGHI, ARDALAN
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 77805267) TO PLAINTIFF SEDGHI, ARDALAN
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-13-2026 CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-25-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-15-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
